$comment: DataCite Metadata Schema 4.4 (JSON representation, as used by Zenodo's own deposit API). Machine-readable counterpart of Record 1 in ../METADATA.md.

titles.title: NYC 311 Service Requests from 2010 to Present — 2025 subset (Jan–Feb, Jul–Aug)

dates.dateInformation: Snapshot download date used by this project; the source portal itself is continuously updated

rightsList.rights: Local Law 11 of 2012 (NYC Administrative Code § 23-502(d)) — mandated publication without restriction, registration, or license; effectively public-domain-equivalent, no attribution legally required.

descriptions.description: 603,544 + 619,913 = 1,223,457 rows; ~12 columns retained via $select out of 43 in the source. See ../data_dictionary_311.md for the full column-level schema.

relatedIdentifiers.$comment: Reserved Zenodo Sandbox DOI for this project's derived joined dataset (Record 3 / record_analysis_daily.json), which this source feeds into. Sandbox DOI: does not resolve on real doi.org.
